  "findings": [
    "First-article dimensions do not match the engineering drawing (DOC+ME) requirements during visual and dimensional inspection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the production run immediately to prevent further non-conforming material.",
    "Isolate the affected first-article component and place it in a designated quarantine area with a red non-conformance tag.",
    "Initiate a formal Corrective Action Request (CAR) and notify the quality engineering team to perform a root cause analysis."
  ],
  "rationale": "The first-article dimensions deviate from the approved engineering drawing (DOC+ME). Under AIAG PPAP and site visual standards, a first-article inspection must meet all dimensional and visual requirements before production can proceed. Because the dimensions are out of tolerance, the component is classified as installed-defective and the gate fails.",

    "AIAG PPAP Manual (Production Part Approval Process)",
    "Site Visual Standards and Dimensional Control Plan"
  ]
